# Prerelease Gate — 2026-06-19 (re-run, pass)

## Summary
- Repo: danieljustus/symaira-tune
- HEAD: 54caf2b12a943ae11033c742953258a49f12a6dc (PR #71 merged)
- Last release: none (no git tags, no GitHub releases)
- Proposed target: v0.1.0 (bump: minor — first release, README/roadmap declare v0.1, 0.y.z rules: features → minor)
- Gate: pass
- Previous report: `.github/prerelease/2026-06-19T14-34-11Z.md` (gate=blocked, 1 finding). This re-run is gate=pass after PR #71 resolved the finding.

## Gate checks
| Check | Result | Detail |
|---|---|---|
| CI / tests (HEAD) | PASS | `CI` workflow run 27835116408 success on HEAD; CodeQL run 27835115960 in_progress (security scan, not the test gate) |
| Version consistency | PASS | All version mentions consistent with target v0.1.0 across README, CHANGELOG, docs/commercial-boundary.md, docs/hardware-matrix.md, Sources/symtune/main.swift, Sources/SymTuneCore/Version.swift. Source-of-truth at `Sources/SymTuneCore/Version.swift:6` is `0.1.0`. |
| README / doc currency | PASS | All 4 original BLOCK findings (CLI usage text, commercial-boundary, hardware-matrix Write-features table, CHANGELOG, README status) resolved by PR #69 (commit d7486f5). The single new finding from the prior re-run (5 prose mentions in hardware-matrix.md) resolved by PR #71 (commit 54caf2b1). `swift build` + `swift test` (116/116) green. |
| Coverage vs threshold | WARN | No hard repo gate (no `fail_under`, no Codecov, no CI coverage step). Effective threshold: warn-only. |
| Assets preview | PASS | `release.yml` declares the expected matrix: `symtune-<version>.dmg` (Developer ID-signed when `DEVELOPER_ID_APPLICATION` is set, notarized when `APPLE_ID` is set) + Homebrew cask published to `danieljustus/homebrew-tap` when `HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN` is set. No assets produced or uploaded by this skill (release assets belong in 07). |
| Security | PASS | 0 open code-scanning alerts, 0 open secret-scanning alerts, 0 open Dependabot alerts. CodeQL dynamic workflow for HEAD is `in_progress` — long-running security scan, not a release gate. Note: `actions/checkout@v6` in `release.yml` is a mutable tag (closed issue #61 was about this; only `softprops/action-gh-release` was pinned to SHA). Not a gate blocker. |

## Resolved since the previous report (gate=blocked → gate=pass)
- [x] **[BLOCK][Docs] 5 prose mentions in `docs/hardware-matrix.md` still claim v0.2 for v0.1 features** (PR #71)
  - `:17` `display.dim.set` Notes — "App-backed, lands in v0.2" → "Ships in v0.1 (CLI; menu-bar UI in v0.2)"
  - `:18` `display.brightness.set` Notes — "Planned v0.2" → "Ships in v0.1"
  - `:51-52` SMCService reference — `(v0.2)` → `(v0.1)`
  - `:88` DisplayService reference — `(v0.2)` → `(v0.1)`
  - `:153-156` Extended brightness requirement — drop false "CLI cannot apply" claim; reference `EDROverlayService`

## Applied mechanical fixes (now in main via PR #71)
- `docs/hardware-matrix.md:13` — `sensors.smc` Apple Silicon + Intel platform cells: `Planned v0.2` → `v0.1`
- `docs/hardware-matrix.md:16` — `display.brightness.extended.set` Apple Silicon + Intel platform cells: `Planned v0.2 (EDR displays)` → `v0.1 (EDR displays)`

## Findings
- [ ] **[WARN][Coverage] No coverage gate defined**
  - **Status quo:** No `fail_under`, no Codecov config, no CI coverage step. Coverage is a WARN by default per rule 6; would only BLOCK if CI itself defined a hard coverage gate.
  - **Likely cause:** Not yet configured; coverage tooling was not part of v0.1 scope.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add coverage measurement to a follow-up iteration. Out of scope for v0.1.0 release.
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan` to schedule coverage tooling for the v0.2 cycle.

## Next step
- gate=pass → `/07-gh-release` (cut v0.1.0)
- The release will create the v0.1.0 tag, the GitHub release, the DMG (per `release.yml`), and the Homebrew cask in `danieljustus/homebrew-tap`
